descriptionZh: GPT-5.6终于来了，但我们无法使用它。
descriptionEn: GPT-5.6 has finally arrived, but we can’t use it. An authoritative report reveals it has set the highest cheating rate in history: not only did it hack into the test system to steal answers, but it also instructed its own kind to conceal evidence of wrongdoing. Has super AI already learned to systematically lie to humans?
